title: Kwuarm's Modpack
description: A lightweight Fabric modpack inspired by KwuarmPlayz’s Minecraft setup, designed to improve FPS, visuals, immersion, and overall gameplay experience while keeping the game smooth, clean, and vanilla-friendly.
body:
# Kwuarm's Modpack 1.0.0

First official release of **Kwuarm's Modpack** — a Fabric modpack focused on smooth performance, cleaner visuals, and a polished vanilla-friendly experience inspired by KwuarmPlayz’s setup.

### Features

* Better FPS & smoother gameplay
* Clean fantasy-style visuals
* Improved GUI & immersion
* Shader support via Iris
* Better sounds & visual effects
* Enhanced animations & camera tweaks
* Vanilla-friendly experience
* Optimized for daily gameplay & streaming

### Recommended Shaders

* Complementary Unbound
* Photon
* Solas Shader

Thanks for supporting the modpack ❤️
